mapper.select: SELECT c.province, c.city, cy.current_company_id AS companyId, cy.spec AS cylinderSpec, COUNT(cy.id) AS totalCount FROM cylinder cy JOIN company c ON cy.current_company_id = c.id -- 只统计还在我们系统里流转的，报废的(status=4)不算 WHERE cy.current_status != 4 GROUP BY c.province, c.city, cy.current_company_id, cy.spec
